baseline.notes: Estimated as characters divided by 4. Input includes the 6-panel brief and CSV header inspection only. Output includes baseline_plot.py plus baseline SVG/PDF/PNG render.

candidate.notes: Estimated as characters divided by 4. Input includes the 6-panel brief, CSV header inspection, and figure-layout-defaults.md. Output includes self-contained candidate_plot.py plus candidate SVG/PDF/PNG render and transcript/token updates.

notes: R5.C Part 1 only: 6-panel figure. 7-panel paths were not touched.
